title: Sattainathar Temple, Sirkazhi
tagline: Sattainathar Temple, Sirkazhi — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Sattainathar temple, Sirkazhi (also called Brahmapureeswarar temple and Thoniappar temple) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located in Sirkali, Mayiladuthurai district, Tamil N
overview.description: Sattainathar temple, Sirkazhi (also called Brahmapureeswarar temple and Thoniappar temple) is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located in Sirkali, Mayiladuthurai district, Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is incarnated by the hymns of Thevaram and is classified as Paadal Petra Sthalam. It is an ancient temple complex with three different Shiva shrines in three stories. The Bhramapureeswarar shrine is housed in the lower level.

topPlaces.name: Sirkazhi
topPlaces.description: Sirkazhi ([ˈsiːɾkaːɻiː]), also spelled as Sirkali and Siyali, is a selection grade municipal town in Mayiladuthurai district in Tamil Nadu, India. It is located 13 km (8 mi) from the coast of the Bay of Bengal, and 250 km (160 mi) from the state capital Chennai.

topPlaces.name: Kazheesirama Vinnagaram
topPlaces.description: Kazheesirama Vinnagaram or Tadalan Kovil or Tiruvikrama (trivikara) Perumal Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Vishnu located in Sirkazhi, of Mayiladuthurai district, Tamil Nadu, India. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is glorified in the Nalayira Divya Prabandham, the early medieval Tamil canon of the Alvar saints from the 6th–9th centuries CE. It is one of the 108 Divya Desam dedicated to Vishnu, who is worshipped as Trivikrama and his consort Lakshmi as Loganayagi.

topPlaces.name: Agani
topPlaces.description: Agani is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Sakleshpur taluk of Hassan district in Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Rudrakodisvarar Temple, Sempankudi
topPlaces.description: Rudrakodisvarar Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located at Sempankudi in Mayiladuthurai district in Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Nemmeli (Sirkazhi)
topPlaces.description: Nemmeli, is one of the Village in Sirkazhi Taluk in Mayiladuthurai district in Tamil Nadu State. Nemmeli is located 3.1 km distance from its Taluk Main Town Sirkazhi.

topPlaces.name: Vaitheeswarankoil
topPlaces.description: Vaitheeswarankoil is a panchayat town in Mayiladuthurai district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Vaitheeswaran Koil
topPlaces.description: Vaitheeswaran Koil is a Hindu temple dedicated to the Shiva, located in a small town Vaitheeswarankoil near Mayiladuthurai, Mayiladuthurai district the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Shiva is worshipped as Vaidyanathar or Vaitheeswaran meaning the "God of healing" and it is believed that prayers to Vaitheeswaran can cure diseases.

topPlaces.name: Velladainatha Swami Temple
topPlaces.description: Velladainatha Swami Temple is a Hindu temple situated in the village of Thirukkarukavur in the Mayiladuthurai district of Tamil Nadu, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sattainathar Temple, Sirkazhi?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sattainathar Temple, Sirkazhi is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sattainathar Temple, Sirkazhi?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (123 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (124 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sattainathar Temple, Sirkazhi?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sattainathar Temple, Sirkazhi at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sattainathar Temple, Sirkazhi?
faq.a: Stays in Sattainathar Temple, Sirkazhi start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sattainathar Temple, Sirkazhi?
faq.a: The top attractions are Sirkazhi, Kazheesirama Vinnagaram, Agani, Rudrakodisvarar Temple, Sempankudi, Nemmeli (Sirkazhi).
